No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a foundational graduate-level physics course, directly providing quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and advanced skills for science and engineering careers (Target 4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course lays a 'physical foundation' for engineering, which can indirectly support clean energy research and technology development (Target 7.a) through advanced scientific understanding.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course cultivates analytical skills and provides a physical foundation for engineering, contributing to technological upgrading and innovation for economic productivity (Target 8.2).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course for Applied Physics Master's students directly enhances scientific research and technological capabilities, laying a foundation for innovation (Target 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to climate change or climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to marine life or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to peace, justice, or institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly aims to 'cultivate an international perspective and cooperation ability,' directly supporting international scientific and technological cooperation (Target 17.6).
